options.name: -s
options.description: Squeeze multiple adjacent empty lines into one

options.name: -e
options.description: Display non-printing characters and show $ at end of each line

options.name: -t
options.description: Display non-printing characters and show tabs as ^I

options.name: -A
options.description: Equivalent to -vET, show all non-printing characters

options.name: -E
options.description: Display $ at end of each line
